concerns.text: Task T009 (Acquire real HST images for validation) is marked as unchecked [ ]. This task is the sole implementation step for Constitution Principle VII (Calibration Validation) and Plan Section 'Constitution Check' (Qualitative validation). Without this task being executable, the plan's claim of compliance with Principle VII is unsupported, and the spec's edge case handling for real data validation is missing.

Task T016 (Statistical test logic for US1) is marked as '[~]' (incomplete/failed) with the note 'FAILED: unspecified'. FR-005 and SC-001 explicitly require Bonferroni-corrected p-values. T015 (Pipeline step) depends on T016's output. The absence of a completed task to generate these statistics means FR-005 and SC-001 cannot be satisfied.

Task T023 (Statistical test logic for US2) is marked as '[~]' (incomplete). FR-005 and SC-001 require statistical significance testing for saturation bias. T022 (Pipeline step) depends on this logic. The missing completion of T023 leaves FR-005 and SC-001 unimplemented for User Story 2.

Task T006 (Synthetic generator) is marked as unchecked [ ]. It is a prerequisite for T005 (Loader validation) and the entire US1/US2 workflow. Without T006, no ground-truth images exist to test the pipeline, violating FR-001 (ingest images) and FR-002 (inject noise).

Task T015 (US1 Pipeline step) is marked as unchecked [ ]. It is the primary implementation task for FR-001, FR-002, and FR-008 (logging). Without this task, the noise injection and bias calculation workflow for US1 is not defined.

Task T022 (US2 Pipeline step) is marked as unchecked [ ]. It is the primary implementation task for FR-001, FR-003, and FR-008 for User Story 2. Without this task, the saturation injection and bias calculation workflow is not defined.

Tasks T027 (Regression), T028 (Validation), T029 (US3 Pipeline), T030 (Power Analysis), and T031 (Calibration Output) are all marked as unchecked [ ]. These tasks are required to satisfy FR-005, FR-006, FR-007, SC-002, and SC-004. The entire User Story 3 (Calibration) is currently unimplemented.

Tasks T001a, T001b, T001c, and T003 are marked as unchecked [ ]. These are foundational setup tasks required for the project to exist (directories, gitignore, README, linting). Their absence prevents the execution of any subsequent code tasks.

Tasks T032a, T032b, T033, T034, T035, and T036 are unchecked. While some are polish, T035 (Integration test) and T036 (Reproducibility validation) are critical for verifying the end-to-end system required by the spec's acceptance criteria.
